hero.title_sub: Reduce burnout with a system teams actually use.
hero.desc: Manto is an employee experience platform that makes wellbeing a part of the daily workflow — not another task on the to-do list.
hero.stat_desc: Of employees feel more supported when they have simple tools for check-ins, Recognition, and wellbeing.
hero.stat_detail: Organizations with strong wellbeing cultures see up to 45% lower turnover and 60% higher productivity. Manto gives you a lightweight system to embed care into your daily operations.

steps.survey_desc: Lightweight 30-second anonymous check-ins built for work
steps.analytics_desc: Predict and address burnout risks with visual dashboards
steps.care_desc: Custom appreciation, healthy micro-habits, and feedback
steps.uplift_desc: Measure employee morale and retain top talent longer

about.title: Your Partner in Building a Thriving Workplace Culture
about.desc1: Sustainable growth starts with supported employees. Manto provides a lightweight, science-backed platform designed to check employee sentiment, capture feedback, and reduce burnout.
about.desc2: By integrating daily pulse checks and automated micro-wellness steps directly into your team's chat spaces, we help managers lead with empathy and clarity.
about.quality_desc: Every PR reviewed. Every type asserted. Every edge case covered.

values.title: The Engineering Standards We Hold On Every Codebase
values.desc: We rely on a strong foundation of integrity, clarity, and purpose to shape every strategic choice we make for our clients.

card1.title: 100% Anonymous Feedback
card1.desc: Protected employee identity ensures complete honesty. Teams share their genuine challenges, enabling leaders to act with real context.

card2.title: Zero Workflow Interruption
card2.desc: We respect your time. Pulse checks fit seamlessly inside Slack and Microsoft Teams, taking under 30 seconds to complete.

card3.title: Action-Oriented Care Tips
card3.desc: Manto doesn't just measure stress; it helps prevent it. Get science-backed activities and guides to resolve fatigue levels.

why.title: Why Clients Trust Us To Move Their Business Forward

tab0.title: Why Teams Choose Manto to Prevent Burnout
tab0.desc: We make wellbeing part of the natural work day. No extra homework, no corporate box-checking. Just simple, caring moments that matter for your employees.
tab0.d1: We embed short wellbeing check-ins directly into Slack and Microsoft Teams where your employees already work.
tab0.d2: Employees reply with total confidence, providing authentic feedback without any fear of exposure.

tab1.title: Understand Your Team's Pulse in Real-Time
tab1.desc: No more waiting for annual survey results. Track exhaustion levels, sentiment trends, and alignment across departments instantly.
tab1.d1: Identify stress and burnout indicators weeks before high attrition or resignation letters occur.
tab1.d2: Filter data by department to address localized issues in engineering, sales, or support.

tab2.title: Proven Retention and Productivity ROI
tab2.desc: A healthy workplace culture is your best growth driver. We help you reduce unplanned leaves and build a sustainable organization.
tab2.d1: Keep key players in your team by addressing work satisfaction issues proactively.
tab2.d2: Encourage a culture of appreciation and recognition that breaks team isolation.

expertise.title: Start Supporting Your Team with Actionable Dashboards
expertise.demo_desc: Let us show you how Manto collects real-time sentiment metrics, warns you of stress trends, and supports your managers to prevent attrition.

services.title: Everything You Need to Build a Healthy, High-Retaining Workplace

srv1.title: Lightweight Pulse Surveys
srv1.desc: 30-second daily surveys that collect honest feedback on workload, stress, resources, and overall team sentiment.

srv2.title: Burnout Risk Analytics
srv2.desc: Track sentiment shifts, department morale, and receive early alerts when burnout risk scores begin to climb.

srv3.title: Appreciation Loops
srv3.desc: Boost workplace morale by allowing team members to send public praise cards and positive callouts easily.

srv4.title: Manager Action Recommendations
srv4.desc: Access custom guides, micro-habit strategies, and resolution checklists designed for modern HR and engineering leads.

cta.desc: Schedule a demo or download our guide to learn how Manto can help you create a happier, more sustainable workplace culture.

footer.desc: Your premium employee experience & wellbeing partner. We build systems that reduce burnout and elevate teams.
footer.community_desc: Get strategic insights, case studies, and business growth tips — delivered to your inbox.
